ai_summary: Here's an executive summary of the document:  Jayaswal Neco Industries Limited has announced the resignation of Shri Ravi Gudi, President (Materials Management) and Senior Management Personnel, effective July 18, 2026, citing personal reasons. His departure from this critical supply chain and procurement role could have a material impact on operations; the relatively short notice period between the announcement and effective date is noteworthy, warranting monitoring for potential underlying issues.
